name: Invisible Apartment 2
short_description: Cyberpunk visual novel set in a future in a mega city where surveillance and hacking are part of every day life, it revolves around human relations, their dreams and their fight for living a free life. Standalone version.
detailed_description:
New DLC Available

This game is now available as a DLC that can be played from the main application. making it easier to switch chapters.


About the Game

Note: this is the standalone version of Invisible Apartment Zero 2 was released in early 2016; however, we encourage you to download the same story as a DLC (downloadable content) from the main application:

Second part of the cyberpunk visual novel series. Set in a future in a mega city where surveillance and hacking are part of every day life, it revolves around human relations, their dreams and their fight for living a free life.

Invisible Apartment 2 is our first longer format visual novel. Part one, which is already available on Steam for some time now was a free introduction to the whole series. This part takes place months after the events of the previous part with a bunch of new characters and a ton of new locations.

Fetch the other parts of the series too. Invisible Apartment 1 and Zero are both available on Steam:
